title: Will there be a recession in 2026?
subtitle: Starts
resolution_source: If there are two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth in 2025 or 2026, according to the Bureau of Economic Analysis, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the Fed cut rates 0 times?
subtitle: Exactly 0 cuts
resolution_source: If the Fed cuts 0 times starting Jan 1, 2026 and before 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027?
subtitle: Cuts
resolution_source: If the Federal Reserve cuts its target federal funds rate range at least once between February 26, 2026 and December 31, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Ethereum price at Apr 10, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
subtitle: $2,050 to 2,089.99
resolution_source: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' Ethereum Real-Time Index (ERTI) before 5 PM EDT is between 2050-2089.99 at 5 PM EDT on Apr 10, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
